message:
Port openapi, plugins, processes, sockets to neo (#5818)

## Summary

- Port `openapi`, `plugins`, `processes`, and `sockets` source operators
to
  the new async execution API (`OperatorPlugin`)
- Each operator gets a new class implementing `Operator<void,
table_slice>`
  with snapshot support
- Add neo smoke tests for all four operators

## Test plan

- [x] CI passes
- [x] Neo smoke tests pass for `openapi`, `plugins`, `processes`,
`sockets`
